option.name: filePath
option.value: /AddIncomeActivity (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /AndroidManifest (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" package="com.example.n03_quanlychitieu" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@drawable/icon" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@drawable/icon" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.N03_QuanLyChiTieu" tools:targetApi="31"> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.BeginActivity" android:exported="true" > <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.SignUp" /> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.LogIn" /> <activity android:name=".ui.main.MainActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.main.CalendarActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.category.AddCategoryActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.category.AddIncomeCategoryActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.user.UserProfileActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.income.ViewIncomeActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".ui.income.AddIncomeActivity"/> <activity android:name=".ui.income.UpdateIncomeActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.expense.ViewExpenseActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.expense.AddExpenseActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.expense.UpdateExpenseActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.GetOtp" /> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.VerifyOtp" /> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.notification_user"/> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.ReportTransaction"/> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.SetBudgets"/> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.ForgotPassword"/> <!-- Google--> <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.gms.version" android:value="@integer/google_play_services_version" /> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" package="com.example.n03_quanlychitieu" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_WIFI_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@drawable/icon" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@drawable/icon" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.N03_QuanLyChiTieu" tools:targetApi="31"> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.BeginActivity" android:exported="true" > <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.SignUp" /> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.LogIn" /> <activity android:name=".ui.main.MainActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.main.CalendarActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.category.AddCategoryActivity" />
<activity android:name=".ui.user.UserProfileActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.income.ViewIncomeActivity" android:exported="false"/> <activity android:name=".ui.income.AddIncomeActivity"/> <activity android:name=".ui.income.UpdateIncomeActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.expense.ViewExpenseActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.expense.AddExpenseActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.expense.UpdateExpenseActivity" /> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.GetOtp" /> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.VerifyOtp" /> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.notification_user"/> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.ReportTransaction"/> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.SetBudgets"/> <activity android:name=".ui.sign.ForgotPassword"/> <!-- Google--> <meta-data android:name="com.google.android.gms.version" android:value="@integer/google_play_services_version" /> </application>
</manifest>
